decisions_seed.title: WAL checkpoint policy
decisions_seed.content: Run wal_checkpoint TRUNCATE on a 30-second timer to keep the journal bounded under heavy read traffic with sparse writes.

decisions_seed.title: Bound WAL growth
decisions_seed.content: journal_size_limit is set to 100 MiB so a stalled checkpoint can never balloon disk use without bound.

decisions_seed.title: Use neverthrow Result envelope
decisions_seed.content: Return ok/err Result everywhere instead of throwing — improves call-site control flow and machine-parsability for the MCP transport.

decisions_seed.title: Plugin registry default set
decisions_seed.content: PluginRegistry.createWithDefaults wires every shipped language and framework plugin so callers do not have to enumerate them manually.

notes: Verifies query_decisions FTS5 search still ranks decisions matching the query above unrelated decisions, even when the corpus contains noise.
